title: Souskluitjies
excerpt: Souskluitjies, oh, souskluitjies. They speak for themselves.
html: Souskluitjies, oh, souskluitjies. They speak for themselves.

steps: Sift the dry ingredients together and rub in the butter.
Whisk the eggs and sugar together until light.
Add to the flour mixture and mix lightly.
Pour water about 5 cm deep into a pot.
Add ½ teaspoon salt and ¼ teaspoon cinnamon to the water and bring to the boil.

Dip a teaspoon into the boiling water and spoon balls of dough into the boiling water – about 5 at a time (if you put more than 5 dumplings into the boiling water at once, some of them can stick together).
Let it boil for 10 minutes, with or without a lid.
Lift the dumplings out of the water, spoon them into a warm dish and sprinkle cinnamon sugar and melted butter over.
Repeat until all the dough is used up.
